Starkville Campus

Starkville Campus

  • Undergraduate Rates
  • Graduate Rates

Fall 2026 or Spring 2027
Per-Credit-Hour Cost: 1 - 11 Hours Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $452.00 $452.00
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $791.50
Capital Improvement Fee $4.17 $4.17
Student Activities Fee $2.08 $2.08
Total Fee (Per Credit Hour) $458.25 $1,249.75
Per Semester Cost: 12 - 16 Hours Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $5,422.50 $5,422.50
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $9,495.50
Capital Improvement Fee $50.00 $50.00
Student Activities Fee $25.00 $25.00
Total Fee $5,497.50 $14,993.00

Beginning Fall 2025: Enrolled hours over 16 are assessed additional overload tuition and non-resident fee (if applicable) at the prevailing per-credit-hour cost. Capital Improvement and Student Activity Fees are capped at the per semester cost.

Winter Session2 2026
Per-Credit-Hour Cost Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $452.00 $452.00
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $452.00
Capital Improvement Fee $4.17 $4.17
Student Activities Fee $0.00 $0.00
Total Fee (Per Credit Hour) $456.17 $908.17

Summer Semester 2026
Per-Credit-Hour Cost  Resident Non-Resident¹ 
Tuition & Required Fees $435.75 $435.75
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $755.50
Capital Improvement Fee $4.17 $4.17
Student Activities Fee $0.00 $0.00
Total Fee (Per Credit Hour) $439.92 $1,195.42

Summer Semester 2027
Per-Credit-Hour Cost  Resident Non-Resident¹ 
Tuition & Required Fees $452.00 $452.00
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $791.50
Capital Improvement Fee $4.17 $4.17
Student Activities Fee $0.00 $0.00
Total Fee (Per Credit Hour) $456.17 $1,247.67

1Those students that reside outside the State of Mississippi (non-resident) are charged both tuition & required fees and the non-resident fee each semester of enrollment.

2Winter Session is billed with Spring charges in December. Tuition for the intersession courses are billed at a per-credit-hour rate in addition to the regular spring tuition.

NOTE: The same rates apply to those courses that are taken as an audit.

Cost of Attendance for Mississippi State University is available at https://www.sfa.msstate.edu/cost.

Fall 2026 or Spring 2027
Per-Credit-Hour Cost: 1 - 8 Hours Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $602.50 $602.50
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $1,055.25
Capital Improvement Fee $5.56 $5.56
Student Activities Fee $2.78 $2.78
Total Fee(Per Credit Hour) $610.84 $1,666.09
Per Semester Cost: 9 or More Hours Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $5,422.50 $5,422.50
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $9,495.50
Capital Improvement Fee $50.00 $50.00
Student Activities Fee $25.00 $25.00
Total Fee $5,497.50 $14,993.00

Winter Session2 2026
Per-Credit-Hour Cost Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $602.50 $602.50
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $602.50
Capital Improvement Fee $5.56 $5.56
Student Activities Fee $0.00 $0.00
Total Fee $608.06 $1,210.56

Summer Semester 2026
Per-Credit-Hour Cost Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $581.00 $581.00
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $1,007.50
Capital Improvement Fee $5.56 $5.56
Student Activities Fee $0.00 $0.00
Total Fee $586.56 $1,594.06

Summer Semester 2027
Per-Credit-Hour Cost Resident Non-Resident¹
Tuition & Required Fees $602.50 $602.50
Non-Resident Fee $0.00 $1,055.25
Capital Improvement Fee $5.56 $5.56
Student Activities Fee $0.00 $0.00
Total Fee $608.06 $1,663.31

1Those students that reside outside the State of Mississippi (non-resident) are charged both tuition & required fees and the non-resident fee each semester of enrollment.

2Winter Session is billed with Spring charges in December. Tuition for the intersession courses are billed at a per-credit-hour rate in addition to the regular spring tuition.

NOTE: The same rates apply to those courses that are taken as an audit.

Cost of Attendance for Mississippi State University is available at https://www.sfa.msstate.edu/cost.
